response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience and some leadership/mentoring through workshops, but lacks the core C++ depth and large-scale cloud compute platform background required for this role. Only a brief 6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago is listed, falling far short of the 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems requirements.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship focus
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Experience with high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Does not meet 8 years of C++ experience (only ~6 months at NI in 2014-2015)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership experience
No formal technical lead title; career oriented toward web/product rather than compute platforms

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infrastructure background
